problem: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved
hypothesis: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Homomorphic. Homomorphic encryption for private computation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
